productDisplayName: Puma Men II Biz White Shoes
description: This white casual shoes from puma is designed for the all-important purpose of you looking great while having fun. This pair is for those who want to make a bold statement without sacrificing on comfort and style. So throw on your favourite jeans, lace 'em up and hit the streets in real retro style. The leather upper offers great comfort and durability, while the rubber outsole provides absolute grip in this Biz II shoe from puma.UpperLeather upper with formstripeCentral lacing system for snug, customised FitLightly padded collar for snug fitPerforation on the midfoot for breathabilityMidsoleLightly padded insole for added comfort.EVA midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleWaffle patterned rubber outsole for durability and absolute grip and traction on various surfacesShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
